title: Create a requirement with multi-size quantities and confirm it appears on the dashboard
description: Verifies a data entry operator can create a Step 1 requirement with category cascade and multi-size quantities and then see the new job appear on the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /forms
Select Step 1 in the step selector.
Select a Category value.
Select a Subcategory value.
Select an Item value.
Enter size and quantity details for multiple sizes using positive quantities.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Click the navigation to go to the dashboard.
Verify the newly created job appears in the live job list.

title: Approve a pending job with inhouse cutting routes it to Step 3
description: Verifies a supervisor can approve a Step 1 job and route it to Step 3 when inhouse cutting is selected.

steps.description: Navigate to /forms
Select Step 1 in the step selector.
Select a Category value.
Select a Subcategory value.
Select an Item value.
Enter size and quantity details with at least one size having a positive quantity.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Select Step 2 in the step selector.
Search for and select the newly created pending job.
Select an approval decision to approve the job.
Indicate that cutting is inhouse.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Select Step 3 in the step selector.
Verify the job is available in the Step 3 pending job selection list.

title: Approve a pending job with external cutting skips Step 3 and routes to Step 4
description: Verifies a supervisor can approve a Step 1 job and the workflow skips Step 3 when external cutting is selected, making the job available in Step 4.

steps.description: Navigate to /forms
Select Step 1 in the step selector.
Select a Category value.
Select a Subcategory value.
Select an Item value.
Enter size and quantity details with at least one size having a positive quantity.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Select Step 2 in the step selector.
Search for and select the newly created pending job.
Select an approval decision to approve the job.
Indicate that cutting is external (not inhouse).
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Select Step 4 in the step selector.
Verify the job is available in the Step 4 pending job selection list.

title: Record cutting quantities for a pending inhouse cutting job
description: Verifies a cutting lead can select a Step 3 pending job, enter per-size cutting quantities and cutter identity, and save the cutting entry.

steps.description: Navigate to /forms
Select Step 1 in the step selector.
Select a Category value.
Select a Subcategory value.
Select an Item value.
Enter size and quantity details with at least one size having a positive quantity.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Select Step 2 in the step selector.
Search for and select the newly created pending job.
Select an approval decision to approve the job.
Indicate that cutting is inhouse.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Select Step 3 in the step selector.
Search for and select the pending job.
Select the cutting person who did the cutting.
Enter actual pieces cut per size using non-negative quantities.
Submit the form to open the confirmation popup.
Confirm the submission in the confirmation popup.
Verify the cutting entry is recorded and the job is no longer pending for Step 3.

title: Filter and inspect a job from the live dashboard
description: Verifies a supervisor can find jobs using search and filters and open a job detail to view its step, balances, and delay indicators.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a search term into the dashboard search using a value from any visible job card (job number or item name).
Select a step filter value.
Click a job from the filtered list to open its details.
Verify the job detail shows the current step, responsible person, balance quantity, and delay/status information.

title: View pipeline grouped by stage and inspect a job timeline
description: Verifies that Pipeline View groups jobs by stage, prioritizes delayed jobs within a stage, and allows opening a job to view its timeline.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch the dashboard view to Pipeline View
Click a pipeline stage to open the list of jobs in that stage
Click the first job in the stage list
Verify the job timeline is displayed

title: Inspect late job delay hours and step history from dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can open a late job from the dashboard and see its delay hours and step history details.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Filter jobs by Status = Late
Click a job card from the filtered results to open its details
Verify the job detail view shows delay hours information
Verify the job detail view shows step history information

title: Enter cutting for a pending job in reports and see it move to completed
description: Verifies the cutting team can complete a pending cutting entry in Reports and the job moves from Pending to Completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Open the Pending tab.
Select a pending job from the list.
Enter actual pieces cut for the job using valid quantities.
Confirm the cutting entry.
Open the Completed tab.
Verify the job appears in the Completed list.

title: Edit a job in Raw Data Explorer and see it reflected on Dashboard and Forms
description: Verifies that modifying a job field via Raw Data Explorer updates the job representation across the Dashboard and Forms without stale data.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open Raw Data Explorer
Search for a job by Job Number and open it from the results
Edit a raw field value to a new identifiable value
Confirm the modification
Navigate to /
Open the same job from the dashboard list
Verify the updated job information is displayed for the edited field
Navigate to /forms
Verify the same job shows the updated field value in its workflow context

title: Set Step 4 lead time and see planned Jama date update
description: Verifies that completing Step 4 (Naame) with a lead time causes the system to calculate and display an expected Jama date for the job.

steps.description: Navigate to /forms
Start Step 1 requirement creation for a new job
Select a valid Category
Select a valid Subcategory
Select a valid Item
Enter a valid multi-size quantity breakdown
Confirm creation of the requirement
Proceed through the workflow to reach Step 4 (Naame) for the same job
Fill a valid lead time into the Step 4 lead time field
Submit Step 4 (Naame)
Verify the job shows an expected Jama date computed from the lead time
Verify the job's step indicator reflects completion of Step 4

title: Generate and download a Hisab PDF with calculated totals
description: Verifies a cutting lead can compute totals for a cutter over a date range and generate a downloadable Hisab PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Open the Hisab tab.
Select a cutting person.
Select a valid date range.
Enter a positive per-piece rate for each listed job line.
Generate the Hisab PDF.
Download the generated PDF.
Verify a PDF preview or generated-document state is displayed and a download action is available.

title: Filter pipeline jobs by thekedar in Thekedar Insights
description: Verifies that selecting a thekedar filters the pipeline to show only jobs assigned to that thekedar.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch the dashboard view to Pipeline View
Switch to Thekedar Insights within the pipeline view
Select a thekedar from the insights list
Verify only jobs for the selected thekedar are shown in the pipeline job list

title: Pull from Google Sheets updates the live job list
description: Verifies a user can trigger a Sheets pull and see the dashboard list refresh to reflect pulled data.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the action to pull data from Google Sheets.
Confirm the pull action.
Verify a success confirmation is visible and the live job list refreshes to show updated results.

title: Create and submit a Purchase entry and see it in the Purchase log
description: Verifies that a logistics user can submit procurement details in Purchase and the new entry appears in the Purchase log.

steps.description: Navigate to /fms
Switch to the Purchase tab
Fill in a vendor value
Add an item line with a valid item and quantity
Submit the procurement entry
Verify the new purchase entry is listed in the Purchase log

title: Filter dashboard to only late jobs
description: Verifies that applying the Late status filter on the dashboard shows only jobs marked as Late.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Filter jobs by Status = Late
Verify only jobs with a Late indicator are displayed

title: Filter pipeline by category
description: Verifies that applying a category filter updates the pipeline stages and job counts to reflect only jobs from the selected category.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Switch the dashboard view to Pipeline View
Select a category in the pipeline filters
Verify the pipeline stages update to show only jobs from the selected category

title: Late indicator consistency between dashboard card and job detail
description: Verifies that a job marked Late on the dashboard remains marked Late in its detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Filter jobs by Status = Late
Click a job card from the filtered results to open its details
Verify the job detail view indicates the job status is Late

title: Create and submit a Bilty entry and see it in today’s dispatch records
description: Verifies that dispatch staff can enter bilty details and the new bilty appears in the day's dispatch records list.

steps.description: Navigate to /fms
Switch to the Bilty tab
Fill in valid bilty details for a dispatch
Submit the bilty entry
Verify the bilty appears in the day's dispatch records

title: Admin login grants access to admin dashboard analytics
description: Verifies that an admin can log in via /admin/login and reach /admin with executive KPIs and analytics sections visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed with executive KPIs and analytics sections

title: Update Order2Delivery tracking and see status updated in the module
description: Verifies that entering delivery tracking details updates the order delivery status in the Order2Delivery module.

steps.description: Navigate to /fms
Switch to the Order2Delivery tab
Select an order or create a new tracking entry if available
Fill in valid delivery tracking details
Submit the delivery update
Verify the order delivery status is updated in the Order2Delivery list

title: Push to Google Sheets shows export confirmation
description: Verifies a user can push job records to Google Sheets and receives a UI confirmation that export completed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Trigger the action to push data to Google Sheets.
Confirm the push action.
Verify a success confirmation is visible indicating job records were exported.

title: Master data changes in Admin become available immediately in Forms catalog dropdowns
description: Verifies that adding or editing catalog master data in Admin is reflected immediately in the cascaded dropdowns in /forms.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Open Master Data Mgmt
Add a new item in the catalog with a unique name
Save the master data changes
Navigate to /forms
Select the category and subcategory that contain the newly added item
Verify the newly added item is available in the item dropdown

title: Clear Late filter returns mixed status results
description: Verifies that clearing the Late status filter restores the job list to show jobs across multiple statuses.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Filter jobs by Status = Late
Clear all applied filters
Verify jobs with different status indicators are displayed

title: Prevent Hisab PDF generation with a negative per-piece rate
description: Verifies the Hisab calculator blocks invalid negative rates and prevents PDF generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /reports
Open the Hisab tab.
Select a cutting person.
Select a valid date range.
Enter a negative per-piece rate for a job line.
Attempt to generate the Hisab PDF.
Verify a validation error is visible and PDF generation does not proceed.

title: Block Step form submission when a required field is missing
description: Verifies the forms prevent submission when required fields are not filled and display a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /forms
Select Step 1 in the step selector.
Leave a required field empty (such as Category).
Attempt to submit the form to proceed to confirmation.
Verify a required-field validation error is visible and submission does not proceed.

title: Validate dashboard date range rejects start date after end date
description: Verifies the dashboard blocks invalid date filters when the start date is later than the end date.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click to open the date range selector.
Select a valid end date.
Select a start date that is later than the selected end date.
Verify a date-range validation error is visible and results are not applied.
